hero-description: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience delivering end-to-end web applications. Currently based in Germany and open to full-stack engineering opportunities.
about-me-description: I am Mohammad Naim, a Full-Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of industry experience building scalable web platforms across e-commerce, logistics, and healthcare domains. I focus on designing clean, maintainable architectures and delivering performance-driven solutions.

I am currently completing an M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg while working at Siemens Healthineers in Erlangen. My work spans scalable backend systems using Node.js and .NET, modern frontend development with Angular and React, and CI/CD automation using cloud-native engineering practices.
I’m particularly interested in building reliable systems that bridge software engineering and AI to solve real-world problems.

experience_timeline.title: Working Student - Software Engineer
experience_timeline.desc: Developed a web-based platforms for automated post-processing and AI based analysis of medical imaging. Worked with large-scale DICOM datasets across multiple modalities. Delivered end-to-end features from backend APIs to frontend, built CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps, and collaborated in Agile activities and code reviews.

experience_timeline.title: M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence
experience_timeline.desc: This graduate program focuses on modern AI foundations and applications, covering symbolic AI, machine learning, deep learning, and AI systems. It combines theoretical rigor with hands-on projects, preparing graduates for both industry and research careers.

experience_timeline.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
experience_timeline.desc: Designed and built scalable B2B/B2C e-commerce platforms handling 5M+ products. Optimized REST APIs and web applications for high traffic and secure payment workflows. Developed logistics systems that reduced processing time by 80%, mentored junior developers, and delivered 10+ projects on schedule within Agile teams.

experience_timeline.title: B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering
experience_timeline.desc: Completed a B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering from North South University, building a strong foundation in software development, algorithms, and system design. Gained hands-on experience with modern tools and technologies, solving real-world problems and developing scalable applications, with a focus on continuous learning and innovation.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform (MERN Stack)
projects.desc: Built a scalable online marketplace with payment integration, role-based access, and inventory management for high-traffic usage.

projects.title: Logistics Mobile App (Flutter)
projects.desc: Developed a sorting and delivery mobile app used by 30+ logistics staff across international operations.

projects.title: Automated Data Pipeline
projects.desc: Created a Python ETL pipeline combining DWD weather and GENESIS insurance datasets for analytical insights.

projects.title: School Management System
projects.desc: Built a multi-tenant school management platform with role-based dashboards and secure access control.

publications.title: Spatio-temporal estimation of basic and effective reproduction number of COVID-19 and post-lockdown transmissibility in Bangladesh
Factors Affecting Small-Scale Fishers Adaptation toward the Impacts of Climate Change: Reflections from South Eastern Bangladeshi Fishers
